title: paeonia corallina var. broteri
intro: Paeonia corallina var. broteri is a type of plant in the Paeonia genus, commonly known as peony, which is a flowering plant with showy flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Paeonia corallina var. broteri include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce stress, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Paeonia corallina var. broteri include dried root tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
